productDisplayName: Fila Men Hex II White Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Hex II makes for a great casual and tennis shoe, what with its low profile silhouette and features.UpperMesh upper with strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for absolute breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with modified waffle pattern lugs, suction and diamond-shaped grooves on the forefoot and decoupled heel for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot with a plastic trusstic shank for ergonomic comfortScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfootShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
